code:
def power(x: float, n: int) -> float:
    """
    Computes x raised to the power of n in O(log n) time complexity.

    Args:
        x: The base number (float).
        n: The exponent (integer).

    Returns:
        The result of x^n (float).
    """
    if n == 0:
        return 1.0

    if n < 0:
        x = 1.0 / x
        n = -n

    result = 1.0
    while n > 0:
        if n % 2 == 1:  # If n is odd
            result *= x
        x *= x        # Square x
        n //= 2       # Halve n
    return result
